prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement access log command operators: the %REQ%, %RESP%, %DURATION%, %UPSTREAM_HOST% operator implementations, and the access log formatter registration.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
